name: The Fool
meaning_up: Folly, mania, extravagance, intoxication, delirium, frenzy, bewrayment.
meaning_rev: Negligence, absence, distribution, carelessness, apathy, nullity, vanity.

name: The Magician
meaning_up: Skill, diplomacy, address, subtlety; self-confidence and will.
meaning_rev: Physician, Magus, mental disease, disgrace, disquiet.

name: The High Priestess
meaning_up: Secrets, mystery, wisdom, science, the future as yet unrevealed.
meaning_rev: Passion, moral or physical ardour, conceit, surface knowledge.

name: The Empress
meaning_up: Fruitfulness, action, initiative, length of days.
meaning_rev: Light, truth, the unravelling of involved matters, public rejoicings.

name: The Emperor
meaning_up: Stability, power, protection, realization, authority and will.
meaning_rev: Benevolence, compassion, credit, obstruction, immaturity.

name: The Hierophant
meaning_up: Marriage, alliance, mercy, goodness, inspiration.
meaning_rev: Society, good understanding, concord, overkindness, weakness.

name: The Lovers
meaning_up: Attraction, love, beauty, trials overcome.
meaning_rev: Failure, foolish designs, marriage frustrated, contrarieties.

name: The Chariot
meaning_up: Succour, providence, war, triumph, presumption, vengeance, trouble.
meaning_rev: Riot, quarrel, dispute, litigation, defeat.

name: Fortitude
meaning_up: Power, energy, action, courage, magnanimity, complete success and honours.
meaning_rev: Despotism, abuse of power, weakness, discord, disgrace.

name: The Hermit
meaning_up: Prudence, circumspection; also treason, dissimulation, roguery, corruption.
meaning_rev: Concealment, disguise, policy, fear, unreasoned caution.

name: Wheel of Fortune
meaning_up: Destiny, fortune, success, elevation, luck, felicity.
meaning_rev: Increase, abundance, superfluity.

name: Justice
meaning_up: Equity, rightness, probity, executive, triumph of the deserving side in law.
meaning_rev: Law in all its departments, legal complications, bigotry, bias, excessive severity.

name: The Hanged Man
meaning_up: Wisdom, circumspection, discernment, trials, sacrifice, intuition, prophecy.
meaning_rev: Selfishness, the crowd, body politic.

name: Death
meaning_up: End, mortality, destruction, corruption, contrarieties.
meaning_rev: Inertia, sleep, lethargy, petrifaction, somnambulism, hope destroyed.

name: Temperance
meaning_up: Economy, moderation, frugality, management, accommodation.
meaning_rev: Things connected with churches, religions, sects, disunion, unfortunate combinations.

name: The Devil
meaning_up: Ravage, violence, vehemence, extraordinary efforts, force, fatality.
meaning_rev: Evil fatality, weakness, pettiness, blindness.

name: The Tower
meaning_up: Misery, distress, adversity, calamity, disgrace, deception, ruin.
meaning_rev: Oppression, imprisonment, tyranny, the same in a lesser degree.

name: The Star
meaning_up: Hope, bright prospects, though also loss, theft, privation and abandonment.
meaning_rev: Arrogance, haughtiness, impotence.

name: The Moon
meaning_up: Hidden enemies, danger, calumny, darkness, terror, deception, occult forces, error.
meaning_rev: Instability, inconstancy, silence, lesser degrees of deception and error.

name: The Sun
meaning_up: Material happiness, fortunate marriage, contentment.
meaning_rev: The same in a lesser sense.

name: The Last Judgment
meaning_up: Change of position, renewal, outcome.
meaning_rev: Weakness, pusillanimity, simplicity, deliberation, decision, sentence.

name: The World
meaning_up: Assured success, recompense, voyage, route, emigration, flight, change of place.
meaning_rev: Inertia, fixity, stagnation, permanence.
